evals.name: fleet-add-verb-dev
evals.prompt: Add the deletecollection verb to rule 0 of the developer ClusterRole in every dev cluster.
evals.expected_output: Runs cub-rbac preflight, then `cub-rbac fleet-edit add-verb --where "Space.Labels.Environment = 'dev'" --role-kind ClusterRole --role developer --rule 0 --verb deletecollection` as a DRY RUN, reviews the list of Units it would change, then commits with --commit and a --change-desc. Does not apply to clusters.

evals.name: fleet-remove-wildcard
evals.prompt: Remove the wildcard verb from rule 0 of the platform-admin ClusterRole everywhere it exists.
evals.expected_output: Uses `cub-rbac fleet-edit remove-verb --where ... --role-kind ClusterRole --role platform-admin --rule 0 --verb '*'`, dry-run first to see the blast radius, then --commit with --change-desc. Scopes with --where rather than editing unscoped.

evals.name: promote-staging
evals.prompt: Propagate the latest base RBAC changes to all our staging clones.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-rbac promote --where "Space.Labels.Environment = 'staging'"` as a dry-run (listing downstream Units behind upstream), then commits with --commit and --change-desc. Notes overrides are preserved and that applying is a separate step (cub-apply).

evals.name: which-are-behind
evals.prompt: Which downstream RBAC units in prod are behind their base?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-rbac promote --where "Space.Labels.Environment = 'prod'"` as a DRY RUN and reports the listed Units (those that would upgrade) without committing.

evals.name: single-unit-routes-to-edit
evals.prompt: Add get on pods to the viewer role in just the prod-use2-argocd/argocd-rbac unit.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this targets a single Unit and routes to the rbac-edit skill (`cub-rbac edit add-verb prod-use2-argocd/argocd-rbac ...`) rather than a fleet-wide operation.
